post.content:
Background -  3 years experience, interviewing for L4 role.
How to prepare for HLD in order to maximise my chances of acing it?
Any resources, courses (free or paid) are welcomed.
Thanks!!
Can you share your experience with depth specialization round?
Can you share your prev rounds exp as well, will help community much
Preparing for interviews as well. If you are interested, we can connect.
Hi OP, I am also preparing for system design interview. We can take each other mock interview. You can read Alex xu Vol 1 and watch Concept and Coding channel videos on youtube.
